2604.17324.title: SigGate-GT: Taming Over-Smoothing in Graph Transformers via Sigmoid-Gated Attention
2604.17324.paper_summary: Graph transformers achieve strong results on molecular and long-range reasoning tasks, yet remain hampered by over-smoothing (the progressive collapse of node representations with depth) and attention entropy degeneration. We observe that these pathologies share a root cause with attention sinks in large language models: softmax attention's sum-to-one constraint forces every node to attend somewhere, even when no informative signal exists. Motivated by recent findings that element-wise sigmoid gating eliminates attention sinks in large language models, we propose SigGate-GT, a graph transformer that applies learned, per-head sigmoid gates to the attention output within the GraphGPS framework. Each gate can suppress activations toward zero, enabling heads to selectively silence uninformative connections. On five standard benchmarks, SigGate-GT matches the prior best on ZINC (0.059 MAE) and sets new state-of-the-art on ogbg-molhiv (82.47% ROC-AUC), with statistically significant gains over GraphGPS across all five datasets ($p < 0.05$). Ablations show that gating reduces over-smoothing by 30% (mean relative MAD gain across 4-16 layers), increases attention entropy, and stabilizes training across a $10\times$ learning rate range, with about 1% parameter overhead on OGB.
2604.17324.paper_summary_zh: 圖形Transformer在分子和長距離推理任務上取得了強勁的結果，但仍然受到過度平滑（隨著深度的增加，節點表示的逐步崩潰）和注意力熵退化的困擾。我們觀察到這些病理與大型語言模型中的注意力沉沒有著共同的根本原因：softmax 注意力的總和為一約束迫使每個節點都必須關注某個地方，即使在沒有信息信號的情況下。受到最近發現的啟發，即逐元素 sigmoid 閘可以消除大型語言模型中的注意力沉沒，我們提出了 SigGate-GT，一種在 GraphGPS 框架內對注意力輸出應用學習的每個頭的 sigmoid 閘的圖形Transformer。每個閘可以將激活抑制至接近零，使得頭部能夠選擇性地靜音無信息的連接。在五個標準基準上，SigGate-GT 在 ZINC 上達到了之前的最佳結果（0.059 MAE），並在 ogbg-molhiv 上創造了新的最先進紀錄（82.47% ROC-AUC），在所有五個數據集上相對於 GraphGPS 取得了統計上顯著的增益（$p < 0.05$）。消融實驗顯示，閘控將過度平滑降低了 30%（在 4-16 層之間的平均相對 MAD 增益），增加了注意力熵，並在 $10\times$ 學習率範圍內穩定了訓練，對 OGB 的參數開銷約為 1%。
2604.17324.author: Dongxin Guo et.al.
2604.17324.authors: Dongxin Guo, Jikun Wu, Siu Ming Yiu
